text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Hm? Nature and Ikuno?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Tannhauser. Howdy-do?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Tannhauser. You're up bright and early again today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I could say the same to you two. Were you the first ones here to wash
up this morning?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Nature got here first, actually. You might say I was a head behind her.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You say that like we didn't crash into each other at the door...
Actually, that's kinda embarrassing now that I say it out loud...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Really? Why? That's so great, Nature! I should work harder to... geduburly too... Yawn. Myum-myum...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Uh, what was that?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Haaah... That hit the spot! And I'm wide awake now! Welp, guess it's
about time to get going.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but you're still in your tracksuit. Are you planning to change
clothes later?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me—Tannhauser, are you planning to get some morning
training in first?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You had that huge scrimmage yesterday. Surely you must be at least a
little tired.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess so? But I mean, more importantly...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I lost, sooo...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Mun... I worked as hard as my average self could to prepare—so hard
that I thought, "I've got this in the bag! Mun!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Buuut, I still lost! Everyone was so fast! I barely had any good
moments out there.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Which is all to say...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Losing just means I wasn't good enough! And if I'm not good enough, I
have to improve!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right, then! Time for training! Traiiining! Ei, ei, mun!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha. That's Machi for ya. Am I right, Ikuno?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, agreed.
...Tannhauser, would you mind if the two of u—

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: MACHITAAAAN!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Turbo? Did you come all the way from Miho Dorm? You've got
a lot of energy considering how early it is.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Machitan! Come run with me! C'mon, c'mon! Let's go, go, GO!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm? Um, everything okay, Turbo? You're not usually this pushy.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Let me guess. You're also feeling motivated after watching
Tannhauser run yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? "Also"?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
That's right! You were so amazing yesterday! You were all like,
"Kyaaah, gyaaaah, BWAAAAAH!" right up until the end!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I wanna be just like that! So c'mon already! You too, Ikuno! All three
of us can run, run, run!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ummm... Sorry to butt in, but I don't suppose you've got room for one
more?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you wanna come too?! Yeah, let's make it the four of us! C'mon,
c'mon, C'MOOOON!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You guys...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Tehe. Okay, let's do it! All together, mun!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oof! Ow, ow, ow! Uh...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita! Are you okay? Yesterday's training with the instructor was really
intense, wasn't it? I'm sore all over too.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Nghhh... Eep... I'm fine! Come on, Dia! We have to get our morning
training in before it gets too crowded!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Are you sure? You're not overexerting yourself?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Mmm, it's not that. More like... I'm trying to charge ahead?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
How can I put it? It's like there's this wall blocking my way that marks
how far the old me could go... and I need to bust through it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I know it's gonna be tough in the beginning, and sometimes painful.
But if I don't blast through that wall, I'll never move forward!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: And I—ow, ow, ow! I... I want to move forward! ...Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I see... You know what? I feel the same way.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Come on, then! Let's do a bunch of stretches before we train. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia... Yeah! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Teio? What's caught your attention?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, it's nothing, really. I was just feeling excited.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Excited?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yep! You know, for all the dreams of ours yet to come!
